title: Smoky Braised Collards with Tunisian Spices
description: A unique Chinese-inspired twist on traditional braised collards, infused with smoky and Tunisian flavors.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger; stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the Tunisian spice blend and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the collards and stir-fry until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the smoky paprika and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the soy sauce and shaoxing wine; stir-fry until the collards are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions and crispy garlic, if desired.
